intake.topic_summary: raw 135 흡수 직후 — 외부에서 N=1 single distinct-genus candidate paradigm 선정. 선정: design-strategy-persistent-homology-zomorodian-carlsson — Edelsbrunner-Letscher-Zomorodian 2002 + Zomorodian-Carlsson 2005 (ZGM decomposition theorem) + Carlsson 2009 'Topology and Data' Bull. AMS + Cohen-Steiner-Edelsbrunner-Harer 2007 stability theorem. genus = filtered-chain-complex → persistence-module-functor (R→Vec_k 또는 N→Vec_k) → ZGM-decomposition-into-interval-modules → barcode/persistence-diagram invariant under filtered-isomorphism. raw 135 tropical 와 algebraic distinct: tropical 은 binary algebra (min,+) on scalars (idempotent semiring); persistence 는 graded-module-on-totally-ordered-parameter (k[t]-module, 또는 representation of poset R) — algebra-on-elements vs functor-from-poset-to-vector-spaces 의 dimension/structure mismatch. 4 false-positive 후보 (raw 135 tropical / raw 134 quotient / S5 spectral-graph / S3 info-geometry) 모두 absorption FAIL — closest 후보 명시.

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 motif = 직전 cycle 의 'single novel paradigm tropical-min-plus N=1 DEPTH' tier-1 promotion → raw 135 흡수. 본 cycle reframe: 직전 N=1 (algebra-binary-on-scalars) 의 NEXT distinct-genus N=1 — algebra-on-elements 차원에서 functor-from-poset-to-vector-spaces 차원으로 dimension-shift. tropical 은 'one binary operation ⊕ on scalars' (0-categorical algebra), persistence 는 'functor R→Vec_k with naturality' (1-categorical functor). 직전 cycle 의 idempotent-semiring 흡수가 본 cycle 의 'algebra-on-elements 는 이미 cover, functor-on-posets 가 next gap' anchor — α envelope 이 axis_a candidate genus selection 의 direct anchor.

axis_a.rationale: raw 135 (tropical-min-plus, idempotent-semiring on scalars) 흡수 직후 외부에서 ONE single distinct-genus paradigm 선정. axis_a 는 'WHICH single paradigm' — algebra-on-elements (raw 135) → functor-from-poset-to-vector-spaces (T1 본 cycle) 의 dimension-shift 입증 책임. axis_b ('HOW STRONG novelty-falsifier 3-tuple vs raw 135') 와 axis_c ('whether NON-OVERLAP w/ 4 prior pools') 와 직교. α envelope (직전 single-paradigm tropical absorbed) motif 의 next-distinct-genus = persistence-module-functor.

candidate_paradigm.novel_contribution_vs_prior_pool: raw 135 tropical 은 IDEMPOTENT SEMIRING (min, +) algebra-on-scalars: a⊕b=min(a,b), a⊕a=a, binary operation on R∪{+∞}, 0-categorical algebra. T1 persistent homology 는 FUNCTOR from totally ordered real parameter (R 또는 N as poset category) TO category of vector spaces over field k (또는 Vec_k): 각 t↦ Hk(K_t) (filtered simplicial complex 의 k-th homology vector space) + structure morphisms Hk(K_s)→Hk(K_t) for s≤t (induced by inclusion). Zomorodian-Carlsson 2005 decomposition theorem: finitely-presented persistence module over PID k[t] 가 ⊕_i k[t]/(t^{a_i}) ⊕_j k[t](-b_j) 로 unique-up-to-iso direct-sum decomposition → 'barcode' 또는 'persistence diagram' (set of (birth, death) intervals) invariant. 1-categorical functor (vs 0-categorical binary algebra) 로 dimension shift; idempotent-semiring 의 'absorbing axiom a⊕a=a' vs persistence-module 의 'naturality square commutativity + decomposition uniqueness' algebraic property mismatch. raw 113 Bayesian (commutative real ring), raw 130 Pareto (partial-order set on vectors), raw 134 quotient (equivalence class), S5 spectral-graph (single Laplacian eigenvalues, no filtration), S3 info-geometry (Riemannian-manifold on distributions, no algebraic-topological invariant) 모두 false-positive 후보 — absorption FAIL 명시.
candidate_paradigm.primary_mechanism: filtration {K_t}_{t∈R or N} of simplicial complexes (또는 sublevel sets of f:X→R) with K_s ⊆ K_t for s≤t; chain complex C•(K_t) over field k; k-th homology Hk(K_t) = ker∂_k / im∂_{k+1} (vector space over k); persistence module M_k = (Hk(K_t))_{t} with structure morphisms φ_{s,t}: Hk(K_s) → Hk(K_t) induced by inclusion (functor R→Vec_k); ZGM theorem (Zomorodian-Carlsson 2005): if M_k 가 finitely-presented over PID k[t], then M_k ≅ ⊕_i k[t]/(t^{a_i})·e_i ⊕_j k[t]·f_j (direct sum of interval modules); barcode B_k = {(b_i, d_i)} = (birth, death) intervals 로 unique invariant; persistence diagram PD_k(f) ⊂ R² (또는 R×{∞}); Cohen-Steiner-Edelsbrunner-Harer 2007 stability theorem: d_∞(f, g) ≥ d_B(PD(f), PD(g)) (bottleneck distance is L∞-stable under filtration perturbation).
candidate_paradigm.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 135 (tropical-min-plus — idempotent semiring algebra-on-scalars; 본 T1 persistence-module-functor 와 algebra-vs-functor dimension distinct) + raw 134 (quotient-canonical — equivalence-class invariant; 본 T1 barcode-under-filtered-iso 와 quotient-of-set vs invariant-of-functor distinct) + S5 spectral-graph (Cheeger eigenvalue-spectrum on single Laplacian; 본 T1 Hk(K_t) trajectory across filtration parameter — single-snapshot vs filtration-trajectory mismatch) + S3 info-geometry (Fisher-metric Riemannian-manifold on distributions; 본 T1 algebraic-topological invariant on filtered topological spaces — smooth-geometry-on-distributions vs algebraic-topology-on-filtration mismatch)
candidate_paradigm.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=YES (persistence-module decomposition on finitely-presented module is finite computation: Smith Normal Form of boundary matrices over k[t], O(n³) Gaussian-style elimination; 동일 filtered complex 에 두 번 적용 시 byte-eq barcode); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (PD_k(f) computed twice on identical (X, f) → identical persistence diagram, deterministic); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=YES (infinite filtration with non-convergent filtration parameter → unbounded barcode allowed; explicit divergence-tolerance via 'essential class' (death=∞) representation in PD_k); n_step_general_bound=O(n³) Gaussian-elimination on n simplices for boundary matrix reduction (Edelsbrunner-Harer 2010 algorithm) / O(n_simplex · n_filtration) Vietoris-Rips persistence; fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=fixpoint (ZGM decomposition theorem guarantees unique-up-to-iso canonical form — barcode is fixed-point invariant under filtered isomorphism; perturbation stability via Cohen-Steiner — d_B continuous in d_∞)
cognitive_frameworks_cited: Edelsbrunner-Letscher-Zomorodian 2002 'Topological Persistence and Simplification' Discrete & Computational Geometry 28:511 (algorithmic foundation — persistence as simplification pairing)
Zomorodian-Carlsson 2005 'Computing Persistent Homology' DCG 33:249 (ZGM decomposition theorem on persistence modules over k[t] PID — barcode invariant uniqueness)
Carlsson 2009 'Topology and Data' Bull. AMS 46:255 (manifesto / framing of TDA as scientific paradigm — multiscale topological feature detection)
Cohen-Steiner-Edelsbrunner-Harer 2007 'Stability of Persistence Diagrams' DCG 37:103 (bottleneck-distance stability theorem — d_B(PD(f), PD(g)) ≤ ‖f-g‖_∞)
realization_channels: Vietoris-Rips persistence on metric point cloud P ⊂ R^d → barcode of Hk filtration {VR_t(P)}_{t≥0} (cognitive frame: computational topology / point-cloud TDA — Carlsson manifesto)

sublevel-set persistence on scalar function f: X → R → barcode of {f^{-1}((-∞, t])}_{t∈R} (cognitive frame: Morse theory / image processing — Edelsbrunner-Harer 'Computational Topology' textbook 2010)

persistent cohomology with circular coordinates (Perea-Harer 2015) for periodic feature extraction → S¹-valued coordinate functions from H¹ persistent classes (cognitive frame: dimensionality reduction / sensor data analysis)

Mapper algorithm (Singh-Mémoli-Carlsson 2007) — nerve of cover of f^{-1} pulled back via f: X→R^k → simplicial complex global structure visualization (cognitive frame: data exploration / nerve theorem — distinct mechanism from filtration-based persistence)
candidate_paradigm.counter_example_where_not_applicable: design with no natural FILTRATION parameter (single static structure, no graded refinement / no partial-order indexing) — persistence-module-functor 는 totally-ordered parameter R 또는 N 위 정의되어, parameter 부재 시 trivial single-snapshot vector space 로 degenerate. 또한 design with CONTRACTIBLE 또는 trivially-disconnected topology (모든 Betti number 가 trivial — H0=k, Hk=0 for k≥1) — barcode 가 single (0, ∞) interval 로 collapse, persistence-module 의 informativeness 0. 또한 design where feature events 가 algebraic-topological invariant 와 무관 (예: 순수 ordinal/scalar measure 위 연산만 있는 경우 — homology functor 적용 불가, 기하학적 realization 부재). 또한 raw 135 tropical 같은 BINARY ALGEBRA on scalars — persistence 의 functor-on-poset-to-Vec 와 dimension mismatch (algebra-on-elements vs functor-on-poset).

novelty_falsifier_triple.algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind: algebra-on-elements-vs-functor-from-poset-to-vec-spaces (idempotent-semiring-vs-persistence-module-decomposition; raw 135 tropical 은 0-categorical binary operation a⊕b on scalars in ℝ_max idempotent semiring; T1 persistent homology 는 1-categorical functor M: R → Vec_k 의 ZGM-decomposition into interval modules ⊕_i k[t]/(t^{a_i}) ⊕_j k[t]·e_j over PID k[t]; 'binary algebra ⊕ on scalars' vs 'functor on totally-ordered-poset valued in vector-space category' 는 0-cat vs 1-cat dimension mismatch)
novelty_falsifier_triple.absorption_test_negative_result: raw 135 'tropical-min-plus-maslov-dequantization' 의 idempotent-semiring axioms (a⊕a=a, additive-inverse 부재, ⊗=+) 에 'persistent-homology-via-min-plus-filtration' suffix 추가 시도 시: (i) tropical 의 ⊕=min 은 element-wise binary operation, persistence 의 structure morphism φ_{s,t}: Hk(K_s)→Hk(K_t) 은 induced linear map between vector spaces — 'binary on scalar' vs 'linear-map-between-functor-values' 차원 mismatch; (ii) tropical 의 a⊕a=a idempotency 는 persistence 의 naturality square 와 categorical level 다름 (idempotency on element vs commutativity on morphism); (iii) Maslov dequantization (ℏ→0 limit on classical algebra) 와 ZGM decomposition (PID k[t] structure theorem on finitely-generated module) 은 limit-of-algebra vs structure-theorem-on-module 의 distinct genealogy. raw 134 quotient-canonical 흡수 시: barcode 는 filtered-iso 위 invariant 이지만 quotient-equivalence-class (object-level) vs functor-iso-invariant (morphism-level diagram-chase) mismatch — set/category dim distinct. raw 130 Pareto 흡수 시: PD_k 가 R² 의 multiset point set 으로 보이지만 multi-objective dominance partial-order 와 (birth, death) interval-as-functor-decomposition 차원 distinct — Pareto frontier 는 'set of non-dominated points', barcode 는 'unique decomposition-summand multiset of interval-modules'. S5 spectral-graph (Cheeger eigenvalue-spectrum on single Laplacian L) 흡수 시: spectral 은 single-snapshot eigenvalue tuple, persistence 는 filtration-trajectory of homology dimension — single-snapshot vs filtration-trajectory mismatch + Laplacian-eigenvalue (numerical scalar) vs Hk(K_t) (vector space functor) algebraic-object dim distinct. S3 info-geometry (Fisher-metric Riemannian-manifold on parametric distribution family) 흡수 시: smooth manifold geometry on distributions vs algebraic-topological invariant on filtered topological spaces — geometric-vs-topological + smooth-vs-algebraic 두 차원 distinct.
false_positive_candidate_raw_set: raw 135 (design-tropical-min-plus-maslov-dequantization — closest as 'algebraic system different from real ring' but binary algebra on scalars (idempotent semiring 0-cat); absorption FAIL by algebra-on-elements vs functor-from-poset-to-Vec dimension mismatch — persistence is 1-categorical functor not 0-categorical binary operation; sub-suffix 'persistence-via-tropical' rejected by raw 106 species-suffix-ban)

raw 134 (design-quotient-canonical-form — closest as 'invariant under equivalence/iso' but quotient-equivalence on objects (set/category dim); absorption FAIL by barcode-as-functor-iso-invariant requiring naturality on morphisms (categorical diagram chase) vs object-level equivalence quotient — distinct categorical level)

raw 130 (design-pareto-multi-objective — closest as 'multiset-of-points-in-R²' since persistence diagram looks like point cloud in R²; absorption FAIL by Pareto = partial-order non-dominated set on vectors (no decomposition theorem), persistence = unique decomposition of finitely-presented module over PID k[t] into interval modules (ZGM theorem) — partial-order set vs structure-theorem decomposition algebraic content distinct)

S5 spectral-graph (sibling — Cheeger Laplacian eigenvalue spectrum; closest as 'invariant of graph topology'; absorption FAIL by single-snapshot eigenvalue tuple of L (no filtration), vs persistence is filtration-parameter-indexed Hk trajectory with structure morphisms — single-snapshot vs filtration-trajectory + numerical-eigenvalue vs vector-space-functor dim distinct)

S3 info-geometry (sibling — Fisher metric Riemannian manifold on parametric distribution family; closest as 'geometry on data'; absorption FAIL by smooth-Riemannian-manifold on distribution-parameter space vs algebraic-topological invariant on filtered topological space — geometric-vs-topological + smooth-vs-algebraic + distribution-parameter-vs-simplicial-filtration triple dim distinct)

axis_a.correlation_with_other_axes_estimate: axis_a × axis_b ≈ 0.45 (paradigm 본문에 falsifier 포함되어 약하게 의존하나 3-tuple deterministic-test schema 자체는 별도 axis); axis_a × axis_c ≈ 0.40 (paradigm 의 algebraic mismatch claim 이 cross-non-overlap witness 의 일부와 어휘 공유 — algebraic mismatch typed enum)

axis_b.rationale: user prompt 'distinct genus' 충족 — 직전 cycle absorbed raw 135 tropical-min-plus 와의 algebraic/structural mismatch 명시 책임. 3-tuple typed schema: (a) algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind (typed enum — algebra-on-elements vs functor-from-poset-to-vec), (b) absorption_test_negative_result (str — 5 false-positive 후보 모두 reject 이유 통합), (c) false_positive_candidate_raw_set (array of raw_id+rationale — raw 135 우선 명시). axis_b 는 'HOW STRONG single novelty-falsifier 3-tuple vs raw 135' — axis_a (which T1) 와 axis_c (cross-non-overlap) 와 직교. β bias byte 199 mod 3=1 → axis_b hot-path. raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 (LLM judge 우회).

raw_117_sub_1_genus_naming.rationale: no -via/-with/-vendor species suffix; -persistent-homology 는 mathematical-paradigm anchor (filtered chain complex + ZGM decomposition theorem); -zomorodian-carlsson 은 founding-figures historical anchor (Zomorodian-Carlsson 2005 ZGM decomposition theorem). raw 106 ban list (-via/-with/-api/-sdk/-tool/-cli/-daemon/-script) 와 distinct. cognitive-framework anchor (algebraic-topology of filtered spaces + ZGM module theorem) 은 genus-level identifier.

raw_117_sub_4_counter_example.counter_example_summary: design with no FILTRATION parameter (single static structure / no graded refinement / no partial-order indexing — persistence-module-functor R→Vec_k degenerates to single Vec_k snapshot); 또는 contractible/trivial topology (모든 Betti number trivial — barcode collapses to single (0,∞) interval, informativeness 0); 또는 design where features 가 algebraic-topological invariant 와 무관 (geometric realization 부재); 또는 binary-algebra-on-scalars 같은 raw 135 tropical (algebra-on-elements vs functor-on-poset dim mismatch)

raw_117_sub_5_novelty_falsifier_3_tuple_.strength_grade: STRONG (functor-from-poset-to-Vec vs binary-algebra-on-scalars dimension mismatch — 1-cat functor vs 0-cat binary operation; deterministic categorical-level test (naturality square commutativity + ZGM decomposition uniqueness over PID k[t]); raw 135/134/130/S5/S3 5 false-positive 후보 모두 absorption FAIL evidence — 5-set reject with rationale)

axis_c.rationale: single-candidate scope (N=1) 가 4 prior pool (raw 135 / raw 46-134 family / P+Q+R / S1-S8) 의 cross-non-overlap 명시 입증 책임. 4 sub-block 각각 structural_mismatch_witness + verdict NON_OVERLAP 명시. vs_raw_135_tropical 첫 sub-block 우선 — 직전 cycle absorbed paradigm 와 distinct-genus 책임. axis_c 는 'whether T1 is truly NON-OVERLAP w/ all 4 prior pools' — axis_a (which T1) 와 axis_b (HOW STRONG 3-tuple vs raw 135) 와 직교. user prompt 'beyond raw 135 distinct genus' 의 backbone.

vs_raw_135_tropical.prior_set_summary: raw 135 design-tropical-min-plus-maslov-dequantization (line 4141) — idempotent-semiring (ℝ_max, max, +) 또는 (ℝ_min, min, +); a⊕a=a idempotency; additive-inverse axiom violated (no negation); ⊗=+; binary algebra-on-scalars; Maslov 1986 dequantization ℏ→0 limit; Bellman-Ford min-plus matrix multiply / tropical polynomial / max-plus eigenvalue 4 realization channels.
vs_raw_135_tropical.structural_mismatch_witness: (typed enum: distinct-algebraic-system + distinct-categorical-dimension) — raw 135 은 0-categorical binary operation a⊕b: scalar × scalar → scalar (ℝ_max idempotent semiring); T1 persistence 는 1-categorical functor M: R → Vec_k 의 ZGM-decomposition into interval modules over PID k[t]. 'binary algebra on scalars' (raw 135) vs 'functor from totally-ordered-poset to Vec_k category with structure morphisms' (T1) 차원 mismatch. raw 135 의 a⊕a=a idempotency 는 element-level absorbing axiom; T1 의 naturality square commutativity 는 morphism-level diagram-chase property — distinct categorical level. raw 135 의 Maslov dequantization (ℏ→0 limit on classical Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman) 와 T1 의 ZGM decomposition theorem (structure theorem on finitely-presented module over PID k[t]) 은 distinct genealogy.
vs_raw_135_tropical.closest_overlap_candidate: raw 135 자체 (직전 absorbed) — 그러나 0-cat algebra vs 1-cat functor dimension mismatch 로 NON_OVERLAP 유지

vs_raw_46_134_family.prior_set_summary: 51 entries (raw 46-134) — raw 113 Bayesian (commutative real ring), raw 130 Pareto (partial-order set on vectors), raw 119 temporal-decay (real-valued recurrence with half-life), raw 134 quotient-canonical (equivalence-class quotient), raw 133 predictive-coding-FEP, raw 132 operadic-higher-cat, raw 131 thermodynamic-Landauer, raw 129 differential-privacy 등.
vs_raw_46_134_family.structural_mismatch_witness: (typed enum: distinct-algebraic-system + distinct-functor-vs-set) — 51 entries 중 어느 것도 'persistence-module functor R→Vec_k with ZGM decomposition' 을 primary mechanism 으로 선언 안 함. 가장 가까운 후보 raw 134 (quotient-canonical) 는 set/category-level equivalence quotient — barcode-as-filtered-iso-invariant 와 categorical level 다름 (object-level equivalence vs morphism-level naturality). raw 130 Pareto 의 R² multiset 외형은 persistence diagram 과 비슷하나, Pareto = partial-order-on-vectors-non-dominated-set, persistence = unique decomposition of f.p. module over PID k[t] — set-on-vectors vs structure-theorem-decomposition 알고리즘적 content distinct. raw 113 Bayesian (commutative real ring posterior) 는 probability-weight-multiplicative-update — algebraic-topological invariant 와 무관. 5 closest 후보 모두 absorption FAIL.

vs_PQR_narrow_scope.prior_set_summary: narrow-scope cycle 의 P1 (quantum-amplitude-grover-feynman) + P2 (type-theory-curry-howard) + P3 (do-calculus-instrumental-variable).
vs_PQR_narrow_scope.structural_mismatch_witness: (typed enum: cross-domain + distinct-categorical-level) — P1 complex non-commutative ring (quantum amplitude); P2 syntactic proof-tree term reduction (lambda calculus); P3 interventional do-operator algebraic reduction (3 Pearl rules). T1 persistent homology 는 functor R → Vec_k 의 ZGM decomposition. P1/P2/P3 vs T1 모두 PRIMARY structural distinct — complex-amplitude (P1) / syntactic-proof (P2) / interventional-symbol (P3) / functor-decomposition (T1) 4 distinct. 특히 P2 type-theory (Curry-Howard syntactic proof) vs T1 (semantic-categorical functor-decomposition) — 둘 다 'categorical' 영역이나 syntactic-proof-system vs concrete-functor-category-Vec_k 차원 distinct.

T1×P2: persistent-homology-functor vs syntactic-proof-tree (categorical-level mismatch — concrete-functor-to-Vec vs syntactic-deduction)

vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple.prior_set_summary: S1 ergodic / S2 type-theory / S3 info-geometry / S4 LDP / S5 spectral-graph / S6 quantum-amplitude / S7 do-calculus / S8 stochastic-DE.
vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple.structural_mismatch_witness: (typed enum: distinct-algebraic-system OR cross-domain) — S1 ergodic = measure-theoretic ensemble/time-average (real ring); S2 type-theory = syntactic proof; S3 info-geometry = Riemannian manifold + Fisher metric (smooth manifold); S4 LDP = rate function asymptotic (real-valued I(x)); S5 spectral-graph = Laplacian eigenvalue spectrum (single-snapshot); S6 quantum-amplitude = complex non-commutative ring; S7 do-calculus = interventional symbol; S8 Itô = stochastic real-valued differential equation. T1 persistent homology = ZGM-decomposition of persistence module functor. 가장 가까운 후보: S5 spectral-graph (그래프 위상의 numerical invariant) 이지만 single-Laplacian-eigenvalues vs filtration-trajectory-Hk(K_t) — single-snapshot vs filtered-trajectory mismatch + numerical-eigenvalue vs vector-space-functor 차원 distinct. S3 info-geometry (data 위 geometry) 도 가까운 후보이지만 smooth-Riemannian on parametric distribution vs algebraic-topological on filtered topological space — geometric-vs-topological + smooth-vs-algebraic 두 차원 distinct. absorption FAIL — S3, S5 모두 absorption_test_negative_result 명시.
vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple.closest_overlap_candidate: S5 spectral-graph + S3 info-geometry — single-snapshot eigenvalue vs filtration-trajectory functor / smooth-geometry vs algebraic-topology dim distinct, NON_OVERLAP 유지

axes_surfaced.name: single novel paradigm enumeration (N=1) — DEPTH-only conservative distinct-genus from raw 135
options_considered: A. 'Pick free-probability / non-commutative-probability (Voiculescu 1985 — free independence replacing classical independence)' (rejected: cognitive-framework rich but closest 후보 raw 113 Bayesian + S6 quantum-amplitude 가 이미 commutative-real-ring + complex-non-commutative-ring 영역 cover — free-probability 가 'non-commutative algebra of random variables' 로 S6 quantum-amplitude 와 algebraic genus overlap risk, 'distinct genus' 책임 약화)

B. 'Pick optimal-transport / Wasserstein-Kantorovich (Monge 1781 / Kantorovich 1942 — coupling-based metric on probability measures)' (rejected: closest 후보 raw 130 Pareto multi-objective + S4 LDP + raw 113 Bayesian 와 'metric on distributions / coupling formulation' 영역 partial overlap; Wasserstein 의 dual (Kantorovich-Rubinstein) 이 LP-on-measures 와 가까워 'distinct genus from raw 135 idempotent-semiring' 강함 부족)

C. 'Pick persistent-homology / topological-data-analysis (Edelsbrunner-Letscher-Zomorodian 2002 + Zomorodian-Carlsson 2005 ZGM decomposition theorem + Carlsson 2009 Bull. AMS + Cohen-Steiner-Edelsbrunner-Harer 2007 stability theorem — filtered chain complex → persistence-module functor R→Vec_k → ZGM decomposition into interval modules → barcode/persistence-diagram invariant)' (chosen: F1 single + F2 3-tuple novelty-falsifier + F5 cross-non-overlap; raw 135 idempotent-semiring (0-cat binary algebra on scalars) vs T1 persistence-module (1-cat functor R→Vec_k with ZGM decomposition over PID k[t]) categorical-dimension mismatch; 5 false-positive 후보 모두 absorption FAIL 명시 가능; deterministic-verifier 가 categorical-level diagram-chase 로 schema-level)

D. 'Pick sheaf-theoretic / topos-theoretic (Grothendieck sheaf — section over open cover with gluing axiom; topos as generalized space + logic)' (rejected: cognitive-framework 풍부하나 P2 type-theory-Curry-Howard / S2 type-theory (sibling) 와 'categorical foundations of mathematics' 영역 partial overlap — topos 는 type-theory 의 categorical semantics 이라 distinct genus 입증 어려움; 본 cycle 의 'distinct genus from raw 135 binary-algebra' 책임에 더해 P2/S2 type-theory 와도 distinct 책임 발생 — 부담 증가)

E. 'Pick reverse-mathematics / provability-hierarchy (Friedman-Simpson — RCA0/WKL0/ACA0/ATR0/Π¹₁-CA0 minimal-axiomatic-system to prove theorem)' (rejected: meta-mathematical paradigm 으로 cognitive-framework 풍부하나 P2 type-theory / S2 type-theory 와 'syntactic proof system / formal axiomatic foundation' 영역 partial overlap; 응용 realization channels (≥3) 확보가 어렵 — reverse mathematics 는 주로 single-discipline (foundations) 활동)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — design-strategy-persistent-homology-zomorodian-carlsson 단일 후보. filtered-chain-complex C•(K_t) → persistence-module-functor R→Vec_k → ZGM-decomposition into interval modules ⊕_i k[t]/(t^{a_i}) ⊕_j k[t]·e_j over PID k[t] → barcode/persistence-diagram invariant under filtered-isomorphism + Cohen-Steiner stability theorem on bottleneck distance. Edelsbrunner-Letscher-Zomorodian 2002 + Zomorodian-Carlsson 2005 + Carlsson 2009 + Cohen-Steiner-Edelsbrunner-Harer 2007 의 4 cognitive frameworks; Vietoris-Rips / sublevel-set / persistent-cohomology-circular-coords / Mapper 4 realization channels.
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (직전 single-paradigm tropical absorbed → raw 135) motif 의 next-distinct-genus = persistence-module-functor (0-cat algebra-on-elements → 1-cat functor-from-poset-to-Vec). β byte 199 mod 3=1 → axis_b hot-path (3-tuple novelty-falsifier vs raw 135 우선) 와 정렬. γ envelope (LHC OpenData particle-jet point-cloud topology motif) → realization channel Vietoris-Rips persistence on point cloud 가 LHC 응용 — direct align. F5 cross-non-overlap 책임은 4 prior pool (raw 135 / raw 46-134 / P+Q+R / S1-S8) 모두에서 functor-vs-algebra typed enum 으로 입증; closest 후보 raw 135/134/130 + S5 spectral + S3 info-geom 5개 모두 absorption FAIL 명시.

axes_surfaced.name: raw 117 sub-rule (5) novelty-falsifier 를 3-tuple typed schema 로 strong-form 명시 — single falsifier triple strict + raw 135 substring presence
options_considered: A. 'novelty-falsifier 를 prose 만으로 명시' (rejected: user prompt 'distinct genus' strict — prose-only 은 raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 위반 + raw 135 substring 미명시 risk)

B. '4-tuple form (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind / closest_existing_raw_id / deterministic_mismatch_test / absorption_test_negative_result)' (rejected: 직전 cycle 와 동일 form 으로 cycle-by-cycle 중복; 본 cycle 은 직전 cycle template 그대로 inherit 하여 conservative 유지하되 'raw 135 substring presence' 추가 schema-check 으로 strict-form 강화 — 3-tuple 그대로 + F2 strict 추가)

C. '3-tuple typed novelty-falsifier — (a) algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind enum / (b) absorption_test_negative_result str (5 false-positive 후보 reject 이유 통합) / (c) false_positive_candidate_raw_set array of {raw_id, rationale} with raw 135 우선 명시 + F2 strict 검사 추가' (chosen: F2 mandate 충족 + raw 135 substring schema-check 추가; raw 53 deterministic verifier + raw 73 verify-then-seal 정신 일치)

D. '2-tuple — algebraic_mismatch + non-absorbability 만 (false_positive set 생략)' (rejected: false-positive set 명시는 'novelty 가 어떤 existing raw 가 false-positive 후보였는지' 의 책임 — raw 135 명시 책임 충족 위해 array 필수)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3-tuple typed novelty-falsifier_triple (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind enum / absorption_test_negative_result str / false_positive_candidate_raw_set array). T1 persistent-homology paradigm 의 novelty-falsifier 가 schema-level 검증 가능 (5 false-positive 후보 raw_set 명시 — raw 135/134/130/S5/S3 모두 absorption FAIL 이유 enumerated). raw 135 가 false_positive_candidate_raw_set[0] 으로 우선 명시 — F2 strict (raw 135 substring presence) 충족.
axes_surfaced.rationale: user prompt 'distinct genus' strict 충족 — 직전 cycle 와 동일 3-tuple form 유지하되 raw 135 substring schema-check 추가로 strict-form 강화. raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 — LLM judge 우회. raw 73 verify-then-seal — 등록 시점 schema 검증 가능. β bias byte 199 mod 3=1 → axis_b hot-path (3-tuple 우선).

options_considered: A. 'cross-non-overlap 검증 안 함 (axis_c 생략)' (rejected: user prompt 'beyond raw 135 distinct genus' 의 'beyond' 책임 — 본 cycle 의 backbone)
B. 'vs raw 135 만 검증 (raw 46-134 + P+Q+R + S1-S8 생략)' (rejected: raw 46-134 + P+Q+R + S1-S8 도 prior reference set — 본 cycle 의 carry_forward_origin 명시; 모두 검증 책임)

C. '4 sub-block (vs raw 135 / vs raw 46-134 / vs PQR / vs S1-S8) 각각 prior_set_summary + structural_mismatch_witness with typed enum + verdict NON_OVERLAP + closest_overlap_candidate identification' (chosen: F5 mandate 충족; vs_raw_135_tropical 첫 sub-block 우선 — 직전 cycle absorbed paradigm 와 distinct-genus 책임)

D. 'all-vs-all matrix — raw 135 + raw 46-134 의 51 entries 각각 + P+Q+R 3 entries 각각 + S1-S8 8 entries 각각 = 63-cell matrix' (rejected: pool-level summary + closest 후보 5개만 명시 가능 — 51 entries 전체 enumeration 은 over-engineering, 본 cycle scope 외; F5 strict 는 4 sub-block 만 요구)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 4 sub-block (vs_raw_135_tropical / vs_raw_46_134_family / vs_PQR_narrow_scope / vs_S1_S8_sibling_octuple) 각각 4 sub-keys (prior_set_summary / structural_mismatch_witness / verdict / closest_overlap_candidate or pairs_evaluated) 채움. all_4_blocks_non_overlap=true.
